subcodes.first_line: O servant at the threshold of the Almighty! Jinab-i-Ajudan's purpose is such that he may arise to fulfill the conditions of love and prove steadfast therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان حق جناب آجودان را مقصد چنان که بشروط محبت قیام نماید و اثبات
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the power of words; of speech
